title: VisAidMath
description: VisAidMath is the first benchmark manually collected and annotated for evaluating Math Problem Solving process with visual information on reasoning side.
description_zh: VisAidMath是首个为评估具有视觉信息的数学问题求解过程（推理端）而手动收集和标注的基准。

pages.title: Participation
pages.content:
# How to participate

You should submit a json file of your prediction on the testing data provided in "public data". It should be formatted
as follows: 

```
{
    "1": {
        "answer": "A",
        "visual-aids": "connect $AB$"
    },
    "2": {
        "answer": "0",
        "visual-aids": "connect $BD$"
    },
    ...
}
``` 

See the "Timeline" page for additional information about the phases of this competition

---

# Contact

- **Paper:** [VisAidMath: Benchmarking Visual-Aided Mathematical Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.22995)
- **Visit our website:** [https://andrewlightning7.github.io/VisAidMath.github.io/](https://andrewlightning7.github.io/VisAidMath.github.io/)  
- **Email:** [nlp2ct.jingkun@gmail.com](nlp2ct.jingkun@gmail.com)
pages.content_zh:
# 如何参赛

你应该提交一个json文件，包含你在"公共数据"中提供的测试数据上的预测结果。格式应如下所示：

```
{
    "1": {
        "answer": "A",
        "visual-aids": "connect $AB$"
    },
    "2": {
        "answer": "0",
        "visual-aids": "connect $BD$"
    },
    ...
}
```

请访问"时间表"页面了解有关本次竞赛各阶段的更多信息。

---

# 联系方式

- **论文：** [VisAidMath: Benchmarking Visual-Aided Mathematical Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.22995)
- **访问我们的网站：** [https://andrewlightning7.github.io/VisAidMath.github.io/](https://andrewlightning7.github.io/VisAidMath.github.io/)  
- **电子邮箱：** [nlp2ct.jingkun@gmail.com](nlp2ct.jingkun@gmail.com)

pages.title: Timeline
pages.content:
# Timeline
## Final phase
Submit your preferred result with visual-aids and answer. Your answer will be verified against
the reference data. You may only make one submission to this phase, so choose wisely.
pages.content_zh:
# 时间表
## 最终阶段
提交您的首选结果，附带视觉辅助材料和答案。您的答案将与参考数据进行验证。您在此阶段只能提交一次，请谨慎选择。
